title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.804 - Police Officer Gary Lee Michael, Jr. Memorial Highway designated for portion of State Highway 13 in City of Clinton
text:
227.804.  Police Officer Gary Lee Michael, Jr. Memorial Highway designated for portion of State Highway 13 in City of Clinton. — The portion of State Highway 13 from State Highway 52 West continuing to Calvird Drive in the city of Clinton in Henry County shall be designated as "Police Officer Gary Lee Michael, Jr. Memorial Highway".  The department shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway with the costs to be paid for by private donations.
(L. 2020 H.B. 1963)
